name: SAP SE
description: SAP SE is a global leader in enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, providing a comprehensive suite of applications and services that enable organizations of all sizes and industries to manage their business operations and customer relations. Headquartered in Walldorf, Germany, the company offers solutions for finance, human resources, supply chain management, and customer experience, increasingly delivered through its cloud-based platform, SAP S/4HANA. By integrating advanced technologies like artificial intelligence, machine learning, and analytics, SAP helps businesses transform into intelligent enterprises, optimizing processes and driving innovation across the global economy.
